raw:
All drafted edits are correctly applied:

- Imports: `cycleFocusMode` removed, `setCurrentQuestionIndex` added (index.ts:36).

- `switchQuestionTab` retained only for `handleOptionListEnter` advance path; submit-on-last + completeness check preserved (index.ts:399-446).
- `helpText()` matches the required string exactly (index.ts:466).
